parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/search/issues?q={{ encodeURIComponent($json.fingerprint + ' repo:' + $json.targetRepo + ' is:issue label:glitchtip label:automated is:open') }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify(Object.assign({ title: $json.issueTitle, body: '## GlitchTip Error Report

**Fingerprint:** `' + $json.fingerprint + '`
**Error:** ' + $json.title + '
**Level:** ' + $json.level + '
**Culprit:** ' + $json.culprit + '
**Project:** ' + $json.project + '
**Message:** ' + $json.message + '

' + ($json.url ? '[View in GlitchTip](' + $json.url + ')' : '') + '

---
### Investigation Checklist
- [ ] Identify root cause
- [ ] Apply fix
- [ ] Verify in GlitchTip
- [ ] Close issue', labels: $json.classifiedLabels }, $json.milestoneNumber ? { milestone: $json.milestoneNumber } : {})) }}
